top_signals.title: Georgia ports volumes hit by higher costs, softer market
top_signals.summary:
The Georgia Ports Authority said higher operating costs and a softer market were reflected in the latest container figures for the Port of Savannah. 

The post Georgia ports volumes hit by higher costs, softer market appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
